p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem CodeSystem des Verfügbarkeitsstatus v2.0.0-ballot.1 (CodeSystem)

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem CodeSystem der Dokumententypen v2.0.0-ballot.1 (CodeSystem)

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem TI Environments CodeSystem v2.0.0-ballot.1 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Testumgebung für technische und fachliche Verifikation.
Entwicklungsumgebung für Implementierung und frühe Integrationsprüfung.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem CodeSystem der Flowtypes in TIFlow Anwendungen v2.0.0-ballot.1 (CodeSystem)

title.value: ValueSet der Flowtypes in TIFlow Anwendungen

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem TI Operation Outcome Details CodeSystem v1.3.0 (CodeSystem)
codesystem TIFLOW Operation Outcome Details CS v2.0.0-ballot.1 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: The provided task secret does not match the secret stored for the task

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow-core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.1"><code value="TIFLOW_SECRET_MISMATCH"><display value="Task-Secret stimmt nicht überein"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: A required MedicationDispense resource is missing for this operation
Certificate revocation status could not be determined because no OCSP response was available
The authenticated actor role is not permitted to execute this operation
A consent for the same scope already exists and cannot be created again
The consent category is mandatory and was not provided
The provided consent category is unknown or not allowed
The provided access code does not match the access code assigned to the task
A task reference is required for this operation but was not provided
The referenced task does not exist
A valid consent is required to execute this operation
Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
A communication message addressed to the sender itself is not permitted

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow-core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.1"><code value="TIFLOW_MESSAGE_TO_SELF"><display value="Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The communication payload is syntactically or semantically invalid
The insurant does not meet the eligibility constraints for this communication flow
The specified recipient is invalid for the requested communication
The task is in a status that does not allow execution of this operation
The task cannot be processed because its redemption period has expired
The multi-prescription is not yet valid at the current point in time

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow-core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.1"><code value="TIFLOW_MVO_NOT_VALID_YET"><display value="MVO noch nicht gültig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The authenticated actor is not the owner of the addressed task

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow-core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.1"><code value="TIFLOW_AUTH_NOT_OWNER"><display value="Authentifizierter Akteur ist nicht Eigentümer"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The operation requires a task id in the request
The KVNR in the request does not match the KVNR assigned to the task context

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow-core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.1"><code value="TIFLOW_KVNR_MISMATCH"><display value="KVNR stimmt nicht überein"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The digital signature is invalid or cannot be verified
The task flow type does not match the expected flow for this operation
The provided KVNR is invalid or does not conform to the expected format
The authoredOn timestamp does not match the signed content
The provided IKNR is invalid or not accepted in this context
The provided LANR or ZANR is invalid or not accepted for this operation

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow-core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.1"><code value="TIFLOW_LANR_ZANR_INVALID"><display value="LANR oder ZANR ungültig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The task was already cancelled or deleted and can no longer be processed
A resource fullUrl in the bundle is invalid or does not match the bundle rules
A UTF byte order mark was detected where it is not permitted
The provided MedicationDispense resource is invalid for this operation
The signature was created by an actor role that is not allowed for the signed artifact
The coverage type does not match the expected coverage context
Use of an alternative IK is not permitted in this context
The requested access permission is invalid or not sufficient
No required consent was found for this operation
The provided access code is syntactically invalid
The certificate used for authentication or signature validation is invalid
The resource meta.profile entry is missing, invalid, or not supported
Failed to retrieve the OCSP response for the certificate of the signature
Problème de correspondance d'Id de la Ressource

display.value: Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
Problème de correspondance d'Id de la Ressource
